title: lespedeza × acuticarpa
intro: Lespedeza × acuticarpa, also known as Korean bush clover, is a legume plant native to East Asia, used for its medicinal and herbal properties. This plant contains isoflavones, which have been shown to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Korean bush clover include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing menopausal symptoms, and aiding in bone health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or supplement, and its isoflavones are also extracted for use in herbal preparations.
